plugins.name: teradata-query
plugins.description: tq CLI — run Teradata queries, manage connections, explore schemas

plugins.name: teradata-sql-analytics
plugins.description: Teradata native function guidelines and syntax.

plugins.name: teradata-visual-explain
plugins.description: A skill to help decode and visualise the Teradata EXPLAIN output.

plugins.name: teradata-react
plugins.description: Scaffold, develop, and deploy a production-shaped React + FastAPI web application backed by Teradata Vantage.

plugins.description: Author Teradata SQL Jupyter notebooks for exploratory data analytics, teaching, demos, and interactive SQL user guides.

plugins.name: teradata-mcp-customisation
plugins.description: Build, edit, and debug a semantic layer for the Teradata MCP server — custom tools, cubes, prompts, and glossary entries in YAML, plus the profiles.yml that exposes them.

plugins.name: teradata-trial-data-loading
plugins.description: A Skill that guides an AI agent through discovering and loading demo/sample datasets into a Teradata Trial (formerly ClearScape Analytics Experience) environment.
